ground_truth.description: Coconut beach by San Vicente, Philippines. Iconic trees on beach might give it away.
ground_truth.photographer_description: Coconut beach by San Vicente in Philippines. Iconic trees on the beach should maybe give it away. Daytime, clear skies.

locations.name: Coconut beach area, San Vicente, Palawan, Philippines

details.description: A tropical beach scene on a clear, sunny day. The shoreline curves gently with light waves lapping onto pale sand. A dense, continuous fringe of tall, slender coconut palms leans toward the water, casting long shadows on the beach. A handful of people are relaxing on the sand and swimming near the shore. The sea is light blue-green with small whitecaps, and forested hills or mountains are visible across the bay in the distance. There are no visible buildings or boats, giving the beach a natural, undeveloped feel typical of Port Barton’s palm-lined coves in Palawan.

details.description: A tropical coastline featuring a dense row of tall, leaning coconut palm trees along a light-colored sandy beach. Gentle waves lap the shore, revealing clear, shallow turquoise water near the edge that deepens to blue toward the horizon. The sky is bright blue with a few fluffy clouds, and distant, forested hills or mountains form a hazy backdrop. The scene conveys a serene, sunny coastal environment typical of Palawan's tropical beaches.

details.description: Tropical shoreline scene with a long, curving strip of pale sand lined by dense, tall coconut palms leaning toward the sea. Gentle waves lap onto the beach in clear, light-blue water, and a few beachgoers wade and swim near the shore. The palm grove casts striped shadows across the wet sand. In the distance, a forested, hilly coastline encloses a calm bay under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. The overall setting suggests a quiet, idyllic beach typical of western Palawan.

details.description: A vibrant, sunlit photograph of a tropical beach scene in the Port Barton area of San Vicente, Palawan. The left side of the frame is dominated by a dense, towering row of coconut palm trees (Cocos nucifera) that lean gracefully over the white sandy beach. The trees create a natural canopy and cast shadows on the shore. To the right, the ocean is calm and clear, exhibiting shades of turquoise and azure with gentle white waves rolling onto the sand. Several people are visible swimming and wading in the shallow water, enjoying the tropical setting. In the background, a lush, green mountainous landmass (likely the peninsula across Port Barton Bay) rises against a bright blue sky scattered with fluffy white cumulus clouds. The scene captures a serene and idyllic holiday atmosphere typical of the Philippines.

details.description: A vertical shot of a tropical beach featuring a dense grove of tall coconut palm trees lining a white sandy shore. The turquoise water has small, gentle waves rolling in. Several people are seen relaxing on the sand and swimming in the shallow water. In the distance, a large, lush green mountain rises from the sea under a bright blue sky with scattered white clouds. The scene is brightly lit by natural sunlight, casting long shadows of the palms onto the sand.

details.description: A tropical coastal scene showing a gently curving sandy beach lined by a very dense grove of tall, leaning coconut palms. Small shore-breaking waves roll onto light-colored sand, and a few people are swimming and relaxing near the waterline. The water is clear and turquoise-green, the sky is bright blue with scattered clouds, and forested hills or a mountainous island form the distant backdrop. The setting appears warm, calm, and relatively undeveloped, typical of an island beach in the tropics.

details.description: An expansive tropical coastal scene featuring a dense row of tall coconut palm trees along a sandy beach. The palm trunks lean slightly toward the water, creating a shaded edge that runs parallel to the shore. The beach has light-colored sand with gentle surf, and a few people can be seen wading or swimming near the shoreline. In the distance, a forested hill or low mountains rise against a clear blue sky with a few scattered clouds, contributing to a tranquil, island- or coastal-tropical atmosphere.

details.description: A vibrant tropical beach scene featuring a dense, towering grove of coconut palm trees lining the left side of the frame. The palms are exceptionally tall and slender, leaning slightly towards the water, casting dappled shadows on the white sandy beach below. The foreground features clear, shallow turquoise water with gentle, frothy waves rolling onto the shore. Several people are visible enjoying the water, some swimming and others wading near the beach. In the background, across the calm bay, a large, lushly forested mountain range rises against a bright blue sky dotted with fluffy white cumulus clouds. The lighting suggests a sunny midday setting.
